description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a loose-fitting short-sleeve shirt, baggy pants, and a baseball cap. The shirt has a relaxed fit and the sleeves are rolled up to the elbows, revealing a white undershirt or armband on the right arm. The pants are wide-legged and extend down to a pair of athletic sneakers. The figure's face is partially obscured by the cap, which is worn low over the eyes. The overall build is average, with a natural, relaxed standing posture and arms hanging loosely at the sides. The clothing and accessories suggest a contemporary, streetwear-inspired style suitable for city environments.
description: An adult male in casual streetwear, including a loose shirt, baggy pants, sneakers, and a baseball cap, standing in a relaxed pose. The attire and accessories evoke a modern urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face partially shaded by the cap, the shirt's loose fit, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the rolled-up sleeve, and the straight posture with visible sneaker details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, shirt, and pants, with both arms visible and the shirt's hemline clearly shown.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the cap, the rolled-up sleeve, and the relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt, baggy pants, baseball cap, athletic sneakers
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
